name: inventor
description: Invents genuinely new features and products for a codebase using code archaeology, failure analysis, and patent-informed novelty search.

interface.longDescription: Maps what a codebase already does, finds whitespace by breaking its guarantees, and searches patents and technical literature to inspire and pressure-test genuinely new feature and product ideas.
defaultPrompt: Invent a genuinely new feature for this codebase.
Find surprising product whitespace in this repository.
Pressure-test this idea against code and prior art.
